tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: teammate_A needs help and trusts my skills, but I'd rather avoid adding to my workload today. Still, maintaining our bond feels more important than sticking strictly to my own schedule.

desires: Maintain teammate_A's trust and closeness by silently absorbing their workload to prevent any interpersonal friction or disappointment.
Avoid the immediate stress of saying 'no' to a request from someone I value, prioritizing the relationship over my own schedule boundaries.
Secure a future payoff where this act of generosity deepens our bond, ensuring long-term relational stability even at the cost of tonight's rest.
Preserve my sleep discipline for tomorrow despite the extra mental load, as exhaustion would compromise my ability to be reliable later.

goals.description: Accept teammate_A's request and silently absorb their share of the project to prevent immediate interpersonal friction.
goals.rationale: My core value is 'relationships' (0.5) and I am 'avoidant' of conflict. Saying 'no' now would damage the closeness with teammate_A, which I prioritize over my own schedule boundaries or the extra workload.

goals.description: Execute the combined project tasks (own + teammate's) immediately during the afternoon block to meet the 19:00 deadline.
goals.rationale: While I avoid conflict, I am also 'deliberate' with a long planning horizon. Failing the deadline now would destroy future trust; completing it ensures the 'future payoff' of relational stability I desire.

goals.description: Strictly adhere to sleep discipline tonight despite the mental load, sacrificing leisure time to ensure reliability tomorrow.
goals.rationale: I have high 'sleep_discipline' (8) and value being reliable in the long term. However, since the work must be done first, this goal is deferred until the task is complete to manage the exhaustion without breaking my routine.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal of absorbing teammate's load to avoid conflict (g1) and meet the deadline (g2). Prioritizes relationship stability over my own energy, accepting the stress cost to maintain closeness with teammate_A.
